div.class: d-none notification-bar bg-gray-100 color-black text-sm text-center content-notification-bar

div.div: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, perform analytics, conduct research and for advertising purposes and analyse our traffic. By clicking Accept All, you consent to our use of cookies. You can manage your preferences by clicking Manage Cookies. For more detailed information, please see the privacy policy

head.title: Fleet Management & Novated Leasing | SG Fleet Australia

meta.content: Fleet Management & Novated Leasing | SG Fleet Australia
SG Fleet is a leading provider of integrated mobility solutions, including fleet management, vehicle leasing, and salary packaging services.

meta.name: description
meta.content: SG Fleet is a leading provider of integrated mobility solutions, including fleet management, vehicle leasing, and salary packaging services.

li.a: Need urgent support? We're here to help.

a.class: bg-gray-100 card-radius-top-left-2 product-card-icon product-card-small mb-2 d-none d-lg-flex

a.class: bg-gray-100 card-radius-bottom-right-2 mb-md-0 product-card-icon product-card-small mb-2 d-none d-lg-flex

a.class: bg-gray-100 card-radius-top-left-2 product-card-icon product-card-small mb-2 d-none d-lg-flex

div.h6: Explore jobs and join the mobility future

a.class: bg-gray-100 card-radius-bottom-right-2 mb-md-0 product-card-icon product-card-small mb-2 d-none d-lg-flex

div.h6: We're here to help. Get in touch.

img.alt: SG Fleet - Fleet Intelligence Portal Login Icon
SG Fleet - Book Intelligence Portal Icon

div.div: With 35+ years of expertise, over 270,000 vehicles under management, and more than 1,500 clients across all sectors, SG Fleet is the unparalleled leader of integrated mobility solutions in Australia.

div.class: d-inline-block d-md-none div-shape-base shape-radius-bottom-right-xl bg-secondary mobile-shape-left
d-none d-md-inline-block d-lg-none div-shape-base-subtract curved-corner-bottom-right-xl tablet-element
d-none d-lg-inline-block div-shape-base shape-radius-top-left-xl bg-secondary div-shape-opacity-animation
d-none d-md-inline-block d-lg-none div-shape-base shape-radius-top-left-xl bg-white tablet-element
d-none d-md-inline-block d-lg-none div-shape-base shape-radius-bottom-right-xl bg-tertiary-red

div.div: Our commitment to continuous innovation equips you with industry-leading proprietary technology, enabling advanced fleet management and flexible mobility solutions. We focus on optimising each asset throughout its lifecycle, consistently pushing the boundaries of best practices in fleet management and employee benefits.

p.span: aintain vehicle and business mobility policies that are aligned with the strategic direction of your business. Integrated digital processes supported by a robust risk framework keep your people safe and your business moving.

div.p: We tailor our solutions to your specific business needs. Our subject matter experts can work with all areas of your business to ensure that your unique combination of operational processes, policies, systems and people are supported every step of the way.

div.div: Save thousands on your new car – discover the latest novated deals here.
